creator: egypcio@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Cy Schubert from comment #107)

1. changed the sysctl;
2. ran `ntpdate ntp1`;
3. `service ntpd onestart`.

after waiting a long time, it kinda looks better indeed. but, as you might see it's still showing a high offset. would it be recommended just to try other timecounters and see what goes - waiting hours to sync? before I waited just a few minutes (<20, maybe)

root@head:~ # uptime
